tiles.title: Ceramic Blue Tile
tiles.description: Premium ceramic tile with blue glaze finish. Perfect for modern bathrooms and kitchen backsplashes.
tiles.creator: ArtisanTile Co.
tiles.style: Contemporary geometric pattern with a soothing blue glaze, hand-crafted for premium finish.

tiles.title: Marble White Classic
tiles.description: Elegant white marble tile with subtle grey veining for luxury interiors.
tiles.creator: LuxStone Studio
tiles.style: Timeless marble with gentle veining, bringing elegance to any living space.

tiles.title: Terracotta Sunset
tiles.description: Warm terracotta tiles inspired by Mediterranean architecture and sunsets.
tiles.creator: EarthForm Tiles
tiles.style: Sun-baked terracotta with earthy tones, evoking the warmth of southern European courtyards.

tiles.title: Geometric Noir
tiles.description: Bold black geometric patterned tile for dramatic feature walls.
tiles.creator: UrbanPattern Lab
tiles.style: Striking hexagonal geometry in matte black, designed for statement interiors.

tiles.title: Forest Moss Green
tiles.description: Deep green textured tiles inspired by ancient forest floors.
tiles.creator: NatureStone Works
tiles.style: Rich forest-green stone with organic texture, bringing nature indoors.

tiles.title: Oceanic Mosaic
tiles.description: Glass mosaic tiles in ocean-inspired blues and teals.
tiles.creator: AquaGlass Designs
tiles.style: Shimmering glass mosaic capturing the depth and movement of ocean waves.

tiles.title: Desert Sand Slate
tiles.description: Natural slate tiles in warm desert tones for outdoor and indoor use.
tiles.creator: Desert Stone Co.
tiles.style: Textured slate with warm desert palette, suitable for both interior and exterior applications.

tiles.title: Art Deco Gold
tiles.description: Luxurious gold-accented ceramic tiles with art deco geometric patterns.
tiles.creator: GoldenAge Tiles
tiles.style: Opulent art deco patterns with 24k gold accents, ideal for powder rooms and feature walls.
